sections.description: Full-stack SEO management plugin for the RankRocket remediation pipeline. Handles title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, cache purge, and self-updates. RankMath not required.
sections.changelog:
2.1.1

Sitemap: add status_header(200) + ob_end_clean() to fix LiteSpeed 404-header passthrough. Remove RankMath class_exists guard (RankMath removed). Clean 200 on rmb-sitemap.xml and sitemap-index.

2.1.0

llms.txt: status_header(200) fix, init priority 1 hook, headers_sent guard.
